close_reason: Consolidated 6 encode/decode functions into 2 generic functions
description:
Store.ex lines 591-628 has 6 identical encode/decode functions:
- encode_item/decode_item
- encode_lease/decode_lease  
- encode_queue_lease/decode_queue_lease

All use identical :erlang.term_to_binary/:erlang.binary_to_term.

Fix: Replace with generic encode/1 and decode/1 functions.
title: Consolidate Store encode/decode functions
